text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Alas, things are dire. I cannot help striking awe in
the others, but it prevents them from accepting
my Satsuki Sho challenge! May the goddesses
smile upon me...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Enter Admire Vega, a passionate fan from my
year-end party! It seems she is to run in the
Satsuki Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: The stage of destiny has been set!
